_note: Contested council votes (current council, sworn in 2022-11-07) extracted from official City of Prince George meeting minutes. Only DIVIDED motions are listed: each has at least one councillor 'against' and at least one 'for'. Unanimous votes (all for, or all against) are excluded; no abstentions occurred this term. Defeated motions list the councillors who voted against; present councillors not listed are 'for'; 'absent' = not present that meeting. source.page = page within the linked minutes PDF.
